rationale: Trump's claimed Iran settlement is the most relevant new development for Poland, as it marginally eases energy price pressure, but no structural confirmation exists; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', cancels strikes
top_events.summary: Markets surged on news of a claimed Iran deal; if confirmed, could ease global energy prices benefiting Polish consumers and industry.

top_events.title: El Niño under way, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño active; could affect agricultural seasons and energy demand in Europe including Poland.

top_events.title: Vance says Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
top_events.summary: US-Israel tension signals possible shift in Middle East policy; indirect relevance to EU stability and energy markets.
